title: rosa × alpestris var. molletorum
intro: Rosa × alpestris var. molletorum, also known as Mollet's Alpenrose, is a fragrant, pink-flowering shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Rosa × alpestris var. molletorum is valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as wound healing, reduced inflammation, and relief from digestive problems. Rosa × alpestris var. molletorum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various forms of herbal administration to harness its medicinal properties.
